text: Natural Language Processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. One important use is text understanding, where computers analyze written content to extract meaning. NLP also powers translation tools like Google Translate, allowing people to communicate across different languages easily. Another common application is sentiment analysis, which identifies emotions in text, such as whether a product review is positive or negative. Finally, chatbots rely on NLP to have natural conversations with users, answering questions and providing support. From translation tools to customer service bots, NLP is changing how we interact with technology.
